testCases.name: WcfSqlBinding_HappyPath
testCases.description: Happy path: sql triggers workflow and all steps succeed.

assertions.message: Workflow should be accepted (202) on valid trigger

testCases.name: WcfSqlBinding_ErrorPath
testCases.description: Error path: first send step fails, error handler activates.

assertions.message: Main scope should show Failed status when a step errors
